title: Recruiter Singapore Explicit Follow Ups
summary: Singapore-specific recruiter follow-up question set for market fit, proof, compensation context, work authorization handling, and relocation when Singapore is explicitly asked.

verification.notes: Aligned with the user-approved Singapore-first benchmark: use Singapore proof internally, but only surface Singapore framing when explicitly asked.

claims: Singapore-specific recruiter framing should only be used when Singapore is explicitly asked.
The strongest Singapore proof spans Maybank-Ageas Etiqa, Manulife, Mediacorp, Singapore Exchange, and Apple/Pixar-adjacent work.
Singapore work-pass or sponsorship questions should use confirm-directly wording rather than assumed status.
proof_points: Manulife: Lean ML UX practice across 11 APAC markets from Singapore.
Apple/Pixar-adjacent work: Python USD(z), computer vision, and spatial workflows in Singapore.
